videos.headline: USC's Ja'Kobi Lane somehow stays in-bounds for fantastic TD
videos.description: USC scores quickly as Ja'Kobi Lane stays in-bounds and hauls in the 32-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (USC’s Ja’Kobi Lane somehow stays in-bounds for fantastic TD) 2024/09/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Vinny Anthony goes 63 yards for a Wisconsin TD
videos.description: Wisconsin evens it up quickly as Braedyn Locke goes deep to Vinny Anthony II for a 63-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Vinny Anthony goes 63 yards for a Wisconsin TD) 2024/09/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: USC takes the lead with a Duce Robinson 8-yard TD
videos.description: USC takes the lead late in the third quarter as Miller Moss takes a hit and finds Duce Robinson for an 8-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (USC takes the lead with a Duce Robinson 8-yard TD) 2024/09/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Mason Cobb ices win for USC with pick-six
videos.description: USC's Mason Cobb grabs the interception off the deflection and returns it 55 yards for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Mason Cobb ices win for USC with pick-six) 2024/09/28 ESHEET
